criteria_results.criterion: A decision record exists in the project decision log capturing the options-posture / human-decision-surface placement, confirmed by reading the decision block.

The record places genuine human-set value-forks (options-posture) at the orchestration / create-plan-UX layer, giving the reason that per-spec generation stays decide-one (preserving the no-options-instead-of-decisions rule).

The record places unowned-precursor decision-requests as authored content within the plan draft itself -- the same account-for-every-item-or-flag-it class as coverage -- not as an orchestration-layer overlay.

The record justifies both placements by derivation from the app's stated purpose (the AI renders a complete deliverable draft; the human fine-tunes it through the create-plan UX), rather than as an open selection among alternatives.
A diff of the corpus shows zero changes to any snippet or preamble attributable to this record -- machine-checked.
